scripts.build:js: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist; npx esbuild src/agent.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/agent.js"
scripts.build:exe: powershell -Command "Copy-Item (Get-Command node).Source dist/backupvault-agent.exe -Force; npx postject dist/backupvault-agent.exe NODE_SEA_BLOB dist/sea-prep.blob --sentinel-fuse NODE_SEA_FUSE_fce680ab2cc467b6e072b8b5df1996b2"
scripts.build:web: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path web/downloads; if (Test-Path dist/backupvault-agent.exe) { Copy-Item dist/backupvault-agent.exe web/downloads/backupvault-agent.exe -Force }"
scripts.package: npm run build:js && npm run build:blob && npm run build:exe
